ddls:
CREATE TABLE "translations" (
  "translation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each translation pair */,
  "source_text" TEXT /* Original source text to be translated */,
  "translation_better" TEXT /* Better translation of the source text */,
  "translation_worse" TEXT /* Poorer translation of the source text */,
  "reference" TEXT /* Reference translation used for assessment */,
  "score_better" REAL /* Quality score for the better translation */,
  "score_worse" REAL /* Quality score for the worse translation */,
  "assessor_id" INTEGER /* Identifier for the linguist who performed the assessment */,
  "assessment_date" TEXT /* Date when the assessment was made */,
  "fluency_better" REAL /* Fluency score for the better translation */,
  "accuracy_better" REAL /* Accuracy score for the better translation */,
  "consistency_better" REAL /* Consistency score for the better translation */,
  "fluency_worse" REAL /* Fluency score for the worse translation */,
  "accuracy_worse" REAL /* Accuracy score for the worse translation */,
  "consistency_worse" REAL /* Consistency score for the worse translation */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Project identifier */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("translation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_translations_assessor_id FOREIGN KEY ("assessor_id") REFERENCES assessors ("assessor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_translations_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "assessors" (
  "assessor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each assessor */,
  "assessor_name" TEXT /* Full name of the assessor */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the assessor */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the assessor belongs to */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the assessor (e.g., linguist, QA specialist, project manager) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("assessor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "projects" (
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each project */,
  "project_name" TEXT /* Name of the project */,
  "client_name" TEXT /* Name of the client */,
  "project_manager_id" INTEGER /* Identifier for the project manager */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the project */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the project */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "project_assessors" (
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Project identifier */,
  "assessor_id" INTEGER /* Assessor identifier */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the assessor in the project */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_id", "assessor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "translation_scores" (
  "translation_id" INTEGER /* Translation identifier */,
  "metric" TEXT /* Scoring metric (e.g., fluency, accuracy, consistency) */,
  "score" REAL /* Score for the translation */,
  "assessor_id" INTEGER /* Identifier for the linguist who scored the translation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("translation_id", "metric"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_translation_scores_assessor_id FOREIGN KEY ("assessor_id") REFERENCES assessors ("assessor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "machine_learning_models" (
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each model */,
  "model_name" TEXT /* Name of the model */,
  "algorithm" TEXT /* Machine learning algorithm used */,
  "accuracy" REAL /* Accuracy of the model */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "predictions" (
  "prediction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each prediction */,
  "translation_id" INTEGER /* Translation identifier */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Model identifier */,
  "predicted_score" REAL /* Predicted score for the translation */,
  "confidence" REAL /* Confidence level of the prediction */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("prediction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_predictions_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES machine_learning_models ("model_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_predictions_translation_id FOREIGN KEY ("translation_id") REFERENCES translations ("translation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "annotations" (
  "annotation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each annotation */,
  "translation_id" INTEGER /* Translation identifier */,
  "assessor_id" INTEGER /* Identifier for the linguist who made the annotation */,
  "comment" TEXT /* Comment or annotation text */,
  "annotation_date" TEXT /* Date when the annotation was made */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("annotation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_annotations_assessor_id FOREIGN KEY ("assessor_id") REFERENCES assessors ("assessor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_annotations_translation_id FOREIGN KEY ("translation_id") REFERENCES translations ("translation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "permissions" (
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the assessor */,
  "permission" TEXT /* Permission granted to the assessor (e.g., view, edit, delete) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role", "permission")
)
column_names: Unique identifier for each translation pair
Original source text to be translated
Better translation of the source text
Poorer translation of the source text
Quality score for the better translation
Quality score for the worse translation
Identifier for the linguist who performed the assessment
Date when the assessment was made

Accuracy score for the better translation
Consistency score for the better translation
Fluency score for the worse translation
Accuracy score for the worse translation
Consistency score for the worse translation
